name: Trend Hotels and Suites by My Place

current_snapshot.legal_name: My Place Hotels of America, LLC

red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

validation_questions: Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Zero operating Trend hotels — all cost and operational estimates are theoretical
Brand viability unknown — franchise offered since June 2020, zero outlets opened in nearly 5 years, zero projected openings
Marketing fund shared with My Place Hotels, not audited, cumulative shortfall of $430,306 loaned by MPHOA
My Place Hotels may be franchised within Trend's Protected Area with no conflict resolution mechanism
Related party concentration: ~26% of revenue and substantial expenses from related entities; all leases are short-term cancelable with related parties
NY addendum investment figure ($5.68M-$6.95M) inconsistent with Item 7 ($272.5K-$2.95M) — likely My Place new-build numbers in Trend FDD
Item 3 references state addenda without body text — scope of litigation history unclear from FDD body alone
NY addendum states initial investment of $5,677,950-$6,951,450 vs Item 7 stating $272,500-$2,947,000. NY figures appear to be My Place new-build numbers erroneously included in Trend FDD.

FA Section 3(A) states agreement is 'non-renewable' with 'no rights of license renewal,' but Item 17(c) describes an 'option to renew for 5 years.' The FA provides an 'option to extend' (Section 3(C))
